name: Centralize date/time formatting and add invalid-date guards
description: apps/mobile/src/lib/format-datetime.ts and format-relative-date.ts provide Hermes-safe, locale-aware date formatting with NaN guards. 32 raw toLocaleDateString/toLocaleTimeString call sites in screen and component files bypass these helpers entirely â€” they receive no NaN guard and ignore i18n.language, so they render in the device locale rather than the user's selected app locale. Complements WI-918 (relative-date divergence) and WI-921 (validateLocalDate NaN) which addressed specific symptoms; this is the systemic consolidation.
acceptanceCriteria:
**Current state (root cause):** `apps/mobile/src/lib/format-datetime.ts` has `formatMediumDateTime` (Hermes-safe, NaN guard, i18n-locale-aware). `format-relative-date.ts` has `formatRelativeDate`. 32 raw `.toLocaleDateString(undefined, ...)` calls pass `undefined` locale (device locale, not app locale) with no NaN guard. Example sites: `apps/mobile/src/app/(app)/child/[profileId]/index.tsx:80`, `reports.tsx:35,54,59`, `session/[sessionId].tsx:37`, `subjects/[subjectId].tsx:51`, `topic/[topicId].tsx:36`.

**Target:** Add `formatShortDate(iso: string, locale?: string): string` to `format-datetime.ts` â€” same NaN guard as `formatMediumDateTime`, uses `{ dateStyle: 'medium' }`, accepts `i18n.language` from caller. Sweep all 32 raw call sites: replace `new Date(iso).toLocaleDateString(undefined, {...})` with `formatShortDate(iso, i18n.language)`.

**Approach:** Run `rg 'toLocaleDateString|toLocaleTimeString' apps/mobile/src --glob="*.ts" --glob="*.tsx"` for the full list. For each site: (1) replace call, (2) remove local `formatJoinedDate`/`formatSessionDate`/`formatDate` wrapper functions that become no-ops (they were reinventing the helper). Remove the dead wrappers to avoid orphaned code.

**Verification:** `pnpm exec nx run mobile:test` green before and after. `format-datetime.test.ts` must include a test that passes `"not-a-date"` and gets a non-crashing fallback. Run `rg 'toLocaleDateString' apps/mobile/src --glob="*.ts" --glob="*.tsx" | grep -v test` â€” should reach 0 or only guarded fallback sites.

**Sibling WIs:** Complements WI-918 (relative-date divergence) and WI-921 (validateLocalDate NaN guard). Both addressed specific symptoms already; this item does the sweep.
